---
applyTo: "hosts/*/configuration/**,modules/systems/nixos/**,flake/nixos.nix,scripts/nixos/**"
description: "NixOS system configuration constraints and conventions"
---

## NixOS Constraints

### hardware-configuration.nix

`hardware-configuration.nix` is auto-generated by `nixos-generate-config` and committed to git ŌĆö this is the standard NixOS flake practice (flakes require all files to be git-tracked for pure evaluation). Do not attempt to move or externalize it.

Regenerate after disk/partition changes:

```bash
nixos-generate-config --show-hardware-config --root /mnt \
  > hosts/$HOST/configuration/hardware-configuration.nix
```

### user-settings.nix

NixOS hosts may include a `desktopEnvironment` field (e.g., `"kde-plasma"`, `"cosmic"`) not present on darwin hosts.

### Initial Password

All NixOS hosts set `initialPassword = userSettings.username` in `user.nix` ŌĆö the initial password equals the username. This is referenced in the install script's post-install output and in `INSTALL.md`.

### Install Script and Documentation

`scripts/nixos/install.sh` is the source of truth for the NixOS install workflow. `scripts/nixos/INSTALL.md` documents the same steps for manual use and must stay aligned with the script. When updating either, verify the other still matches.

### Post-Install Script

`scripts/nixos/postinstall.sh` is the interactive post-install wizard run after first reboot. `scripts/nixos/INSTALL.md` documents the same steps in its post-install section and must stay aligned with the script.

### Shell Command Gotchas

- `dmesg` has no `--no-pager` flag (unlike `journalctl` / `systemctl`). It writes directly to stdout. Just use `dmesg` without paging flags.

### KDE Plasma `excludePackages`

`environment.plasma6.excludePackages` entries must be valid `kdePackages.*` attributes. Some KDE apps are bundled (e.g., KWrite ships inside the `kate` package ŌĆö there is no separate `kwrite` attribute). Verify each attribute exists before adding it, or the build will fail with `undefined variable`. Check with `nix eval nixpkgs#kdePackages.<name>` or search [search.nixos.org](https://search.nixos.org/packages).

### Known Boot Log Noise (Harmless)

These warnings/errors appear in `journalctl -b` and can be safely ignored:

- `irqbalance: Cannot change IRQ affinity: Permission denied` ŌĆö NVIDIA locks MSI-X IRQs
- `Failed to register with host portal` ŌĆö KDE apps vs xdg-desktop-portal startup race
- `nvidia: mknod failed` ŌĆö udev device nodes already exist
- `wireplumber: wp_event_dispatcher_unregister_hook assertion failed` ŌĆö upstream WirePlumber startup race
- `konsole: Couldn't load pipewire-0.3 library` ŌĆö upstream nixpkgs bug in qtmultimedia `dlopen` (PR #490318)
- `asus_wmi: failed to register LPS0 sleep handler` ŌĆö desktop PC, no S0ix sleep support
- `backlighthelper: no kernel backlight interface` / `charge thresholds not supported` ŌĆö desktop PC, no laptop features
- `DiscoverNotifier: No system installations found` (flatpak) ŌĆö Flatpak not installed
- `bluetooth: hci0: Reading Intel version command failed (-22)` ŌĆö Intel AX200 firmware timing on boot; BT works at desktop
